metadata.name: Cert-Manager
metadata.description: Helm chart for cert-manager, a Kubernetes add-on that automates TLS certificate management and issuance from sources like Let's Encrypt.

items.name: dns_nameserver_1
items.title: Primary DNS
items.description: Primary DNS nameserver for DNS01 challenges

items.name: dns_nameserver_2
items.title: Secondary DNS
items.description: Secondary DNS nameserver for DNS01 challenges

items.name: dns_recursive_nameservers_only
items.title: Recursive DNS
items.description: Use only recursive nameservers for DNS01 challenges
